name: @frnkclsst/d3charts
description: Reusable chart library built with D3 v7 and TypeScript
author: frank.closset@gmail.com

scripts.build: echo "[1/3] Linting..." && node scripts/lint.mjs && echo "[2/3] Testing..." && vitest run && echo "[3/3] Bundling..." && tsup && node -e "const{mkdirSync,copyFileSync}=require('fs');mkdirSync('dist/css',{recursive:true});copyFileSync('src/css/d3charts.css','dist/css/d3charts.css')"
